title: Miscellaneous
text:
Guest editor of Crystals (2025).
Session co-chair of the International Conference on System Reliability and Safety Engineering (SRSE 2021-2024).
Committee member of the International Conference on Machine Vision and Information Technology (CMVIT 2021-2022).
Reviewer around 20 well-known journals, including Technometrics, IISE Transactions, IEEE Transactions on Industrial Informatics, IEEE Transactions on Reliability, IEEE Transactions on Instrument and Measurement, Reliability Engineering & System Safety, Measurement, and Engineering Applications of Artificial Intelligence.

title: 中文简历
text:
男，汉族，现任香港理工大学工业系统工程系助理教授（研究），博士毕业于新加坡国立大学工业系统工程与管理系，导师叶志盛教授，曾任香港城市大学博士后，导师Min XIE 教授(欧洲科学与艺术院院士)，香港科学园可靠性及系统安全研发中心（香港理工大学与美国马里兰大学联合成立）博士后研究员，导师C.K.M. LEE 教授。
近五年来，主持3项项目，包括香港研究资助局优配研究金（GRF）项目1项和国家自然科学基金(NSFC)青年项目（C类）1项，总金额超过140 万港币。 以第一/通讯作者发表高水平期刊论文15 篇（其中JCR 一区14 篇），研究成果发表于Technometrics, Journal of Quality Technology, IEEE Transactions (TII, TASE, TTE, TIM), Reliability Engineering& System Safety等质量与可靠性领域权威期刊，研究成果在包括风力发电机、光伏发电系统和储能锂电池在内的多种新能源装备中得到应用。

邮箱：xingcliu@polyu.edu.hk (优先); xingchenliu@u.nus.edu
电话：(852) 2766 6580
办公：E座6楼 EF612室
地址：香港九龙红磡香港理工大学

title: About
text: 刘星辰的个人主页

title: Xingchen Liu
text:
Email
  
  
    
     Google Scholar
  
  
    
     ORCID
  

  
  
I am currently working as a Research Assistant Professor in the Department of Industrial and Systems Engineering, The Hong Kong Polytechnic University. My research interests include condition monitoring, fault diagnosis, prognostics and health management, and machine learning.


I am looking for a motivated PhD student with strong programming, engineering, and/or mathematical foundations to work with me. If you’re interested, please feel free to email me your CV, transcript(s), and a brief description of your research interests. I review all inquires but may only be able to reply to selected candidates.




2025.01–present: The Hong Kong Polytechnic University, Department of Industrial and Systems Engineering, Research Assistant Professor
2023.07–2024.12: Hong Kong Science Park, Centre for Advances in Reliability and Safety, Postdoctoral Fellow, mentor: Prof. C.K.M. LEE
2022.01–2023.04: City University of Hong Kong, Department of Advanced Design and Systems Engineering, Postdoc., mentor: Prof. Min XIE





2017.08–2021.08: National University of Singapore, Department of Industrial Systems Engineering and Management, Ph.D., supervisor: Prof. Zhi-Sheng YE
2014.09–2017.06: University of Science and Technology of China, Instrument Science and Technology, M.Sc., supervoisor: Prof. Qingbo HE
2010.09–2014.06: Hunan University, Measurement and Control Technology and Instrumentation, B.Eng.





Email: xingcliu@polyu.edu.hk (Primary); xingchenliu@u.nus.edu
Phone: (852) 2766 6580
Office: E Building, 6th Floor, Room EF612
Address: The Hong Kong Polytechnic University, Hong Kong

title: Projects
text:
Research Grants Council (RGC) of Hong Kong, General Research Fund (GRF), 1523652, Joint Optimization of Fleet-Level Battery Reallocation and Replacement based on Real-Time Health Status Estimation and Prediction under Complex Degradation, 2027.01-2029.12, Funding: HKD 810,114, Ongoing, Principal Investigator.
National Natural Science Foundation of China (NSFC), Young Scientists Fund (Type C), 72501245, Health Management of Renewable Energy Systems Considering Complex Operating Conditions and Multiple Uncertainties, 2026.01-2028.12, Funding: RMB 300,000, Ongoing, Principal Investigator.
The Hong Kong Polytechnic University, RAP Research Start-up Fund under Stragegic Hiring, P0054859, Monitoring, Diagnosis and Prognostics of Renewable Energy Systems under Complex Operating Conditions, 2025.03-2027.03, Funding: HKD 300,000, Ongoing, Principal Investigator.

title: Xingchen Liu
text:
我的 个人主页 是基于 Chi Zhang (github) 的个人主页修改而来的。
你可以 Fork 本仓库，然后酌情修改你的个人信息，编译后即可生成你的个人主页。这种方法无需注册域名，也不用学习 HTML 和 CSS 等前端知识，直接使用 GitHub Pages 即可完成个人主页的搭建。
具体制作过程参见：

连小白, 2025, 50 分钟搞定个人主页：Fork 模板 + GitHub Pages + Quarto 完整教程.

本仓库的使用方法：

你可以点击本页右上方的 ⭐Star 按钮来收藏本仓库，方便日后查阅；
也可以点击 Use this template 按钮来快速 Fork 本仓库。
你制作个人主页期间有任何问题，可以在 Discussions 提问和讨论。
